calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motin To Set Aside Default And Default Court Order
Off Calendar Jul-28-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lilliana Bouvet, in court, in propria persona, Respondent; Jennifer McGuire, via ZOOM, for William Webb, Jr., Petitioner.

Ms. Bouvet and Ms. McGuire offer oral testimony in support of their positions regarding Respondent's Motion to Set Aside Default and Default Court Order.

Upon conclusion of argument, the court confirms its tentative ruling. The Respondent's motion to set aside default and default court order pursuant to california code of civil procedure section 473(b) is denied.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Neves. Not reported.

Petition To Invalidate Trust Amendment And Remove Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-03-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jennifer McGuire appeared by zoom for and with William Webb (Petitioner) by zoom.

The Court noted that Ms. Bouvet is not present, that she was told at the last hearing that she needed to file written objections by February 1, 2021 and that no objections have been filed. The Petition to Invalidate Trust Amendment and Remove Trustee is under submission with the Court's intent to grant the petition.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition To Invalidate Trust Amendment And Remove Trustee
Off Calendar Jan-25-2021 Continued To Feb-22-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jennifer McGuire appeared by zoom for William Webb, Jr.
Liliana Bouvet in Propria Persona (in court).

Ms. McGuire stated that they are still in the same position where Ms. Bouvet has not filed a response to the petition, that she has requested that the Court grant her petition pursuant to Probate Code 1022, that this petition has been on file for almost two years and that they still don't have any type of response. Ms. Bouvet stated that she submitted her response to Counsel about three weeks ago, that she was not aware, that she is representing herself and doing her best, and requested an extension to respond. The Petition to Invalidate Trust Amendment and Remove Trustee is continued to February 22, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Bouvet is to file her response no later than February 1, 2021.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition To Invalidate Trust Amendment And Remove Trustee
Off Calendar Feb-03-2020 Continued To Mar-30-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Liliana Bouvet, respondent in propria persona.
Jennifer McGuire for petitioner William Webb Jr.

The Court noted this matter was previously continued for Ms. Bouvet to find counsel and file written objections prior to today's hearing. Ms. Bouvet stated she tried to file her objections, but it got rejected, that she doesn't know how, that she has just moved and started another job. The Court enquired what her objections are. Ms. Bouvet stated her husband was of sound mind, that her husband changed the Trust because his nephew wanted to send him to a nursing home, that he didn't want to use his assets since he owns 1/2 of the house, that she took care of her husband for 5 years, that she had affection for him, that his family did not want to help financially, that she did not want any gifts from his estate, that his last wish was to stay in his house, that he wanted to fulfill his mother's wishes for him to get married, and spoke of family dynamics. The Court noted the objections need to be filed. Ms. Bouvet stated she cannot afford a lawyer. Ms. McGuire stated she did receive the response by email on Thursday, that it was not timely, that it was not signed, that it did not contain legal argument, and that the petition should be granted on its face or move forward with an evidentiary hearing. Ms. Bouvet stated the capacity declaration from Dr. Hughey was biased on assumption of her overcharging and undue influence, and that her husband was not wearing his hearing aid at the neuropsychological exam. The Court stated Ms. Bouvet should continue to look for a lawyer, that objections must be filed for the court to consider them, that she must comply with SFLR and any other rules.

The Court orders the parties to meet and confer prior to filing a joint status report by noon March 23, 2020. The joint status report to include the factual issues, dispute of facts, the overall time estimate of the evidentiary hearing, who the witnesses will be, and time estimates of witness testimony.

The Petition to Invalidate Trust Amendment and Remove Trustee is continued to March 30, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joeseph M. Quinn. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Matter not reported.

Petition To Invalidate Trust Amendment And Remove Trustee
Off Calendar Dec-09-2019 Continued To Feb-03-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jennifer McGuire for William Webb (Petitioner).
Liliana Bouvet in Propria Persona.

Ms. Bouvet requested a continuance stating that her Husband just passed away last month, that she has been in mourning and that she has not had a chance to hire a Lawyer. Ms. McGuire stated that the petition has been on file for a number of months, that Ms. Bouvet was personally served several months back and that she has had plenty of time. The Petition to Invalidate Trust Amendment and Remove Trustee is continued to February 3, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Ms. Bouvet that if she does not find an Attorney, she will have to file written objections one week before the hearing.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
